mission.title: knative: Using nodeSelector/tolerations with Serving?
mission.description: Using nodeSelector/tolerations with Serving?. Requested by 33+ users.

steps.title: Check current knative deployment
steps.description:
Verify your knative version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
helm list -n knative 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working knative installation.

steps.title: Review knative configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant knative configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
kubectl get configmap -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative
```
👋  This is kind of part question/feature request! 

Could `Revision`  be extended to support using Tolerations and/or Node Selectors? I get the reason why it doesn't include the entire pod spec, but I think some additional attributes to influence

steps.title: Apply the fix for Using nodeSelector/tolerations with Serving?
steps.description:
Thought this wouldn't be too controversial, so  and I took a crack at it.
  * Support for `nodeSelector` and `tolerations` in revision spec
```yaml
[
    {"op": "add", "path": "/spec/template/spec/nodeSelector", "value": {"agentpool":"fabrikam"}},
    {"op": "add", "path": "/spec/template/spec/tolerations", "value": 
        [
            {
                "key": "partition",
                "operator": "Equal",
                "value": "fabrikam",
                "effect": "NoExecute"
          }
        ]
    }
]
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n knative -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative
kubectl get events -n knative --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Using nodeSelector/tolerations with Serving?" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Thought this wouldn't be too controversial, so  and I took a crack at it.
  * Support for `nodeSelector` and `tolerations` in revision spec
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  annotations:
    scheduler.alpha.kubernetes.io/node-selector: env=production

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with knative installed or the issue environment reproducible.
